title: <div><tt>3. Autophagic Dictionary (every definition contains and consumes the wo
content:
3. Autophagic Dictionary (every definition contains and consumes the word it defines)
4. Glossolalic Virus (a contagious tongue that rewrites the speaker's native language in real time)
5. Zero-Width Script (text hidden in the non-spaces between letters, visible only when language fails)
6. Anagrammatic Ontology (reality is the sum of all possible rearrangements of a single ur-sentence)
7. Punctuation Supremacy (periods, commas, parentheses are the only true entities; words are their slaves)
8. Silent Phonology (the Nexus is pure intonation without phones — pitch, stress, juncture as scripture)
9. Translation Singularity (every act of translation births a new language that immediately translates everything else, recursively)
10. Apostrophic Void (the Nexus is the set of all words that have been deleted, struck through, or abandoned mid-utterance)

Mandatory Structure (follow precisely):
1. One-sentence axiom that defines the entire ontology in the most brutal, elegant way possible.
context: From document: You are a visionary designer tasked with creating the ultimate synthesis… — chunk 9 (chunk 9/18)
